message.content:
@startuml
actor "Project Manager" as PM1
participant ":ProjectManagerUI" as UI
participant AGVServerThread
participant AVGManagerController
participant CodingAndDecoding2

PM1 -> UI : Wants to assign ready go Orders to an AGY\nmessage
activate UI
UI->AGVServerThread:start
deactivate UI
activate AGVServerThread
note right of AGVServerThread: Decoding(r)
CodingAndDecoding2<-AGVServerThread:message
AVGManagerController <- AGVServerThread:FifoAGV()
loop until orderList is empty 
    note left of AVGManagerController: findavailableOrder()\nfindavailableAGV(weight,volume)\ncreateTaskandSave(description,order.agv)\ndoTask()
end loop 

@enduml
